data.title: record-test-status.sh: 25 associated tests for preplanning/SKILL.md exceed advisory threshold (20), risking SIGURG interruption
data.description:
When record-test-status.sh is run for staged changes to plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md, it reports:

NOTE: 25 associated tests exceed advisory threshold (20). If SIGURG interrupts, re-invoke to resume from progress file.

Command used: bash plugins/dso/scripts/record-test-status.sh plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md

The 25 associated tests are:
- tests/hooks/test-escalate-orchestrator.sh
- tests/hooks/test-fix-bug-skill-directive.sh
- tests/hooks/test-fix-bug-skill.sh
- tests/hooks/test-generate-claude-md-skill.sh
- tests/hooks/test-init-skill.sh
- tests/hooks/test-residual-state-e2e.sh
- tests/plugin/test-audit-skill-resolution.sh
- tests/scripts/test-check-skill-refs.sh
- tests/scripts/test-create-bug-skill-smoke.sh
- tests/scripts/test-generate-test-index.sh
- tests/scripts/test-qualify-skill-refs.sh
- tests/scripts/test-skill-path-refs.sh
- tests/scripts/test-skill-script-paths.sh
- tests/scripts/test-skill-trace-analyze-shim.sh
- tests/scripts/test-skill-trace-analyze.sh
- tests/scripts/test-sprint-skill-doc-writer-dispatch.sh
- tests/scripts/test-v2-skills-cleanup.sh
- tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh
- tests/skills/test-design-skills-cross-stack.sh
- tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- tests/skills/test-preplanning-noninteractive-checkpoints.sh
- tests/skills/test-preplanning-scope-split-precedence.sh
- tests/skills/test-quick-ref-skill.sh
- tests/skills/test-skill-nesting-depth.sh
- tests/skills/test-sprint-skill-step10-no-merge-to-main.sh

This exceeds the advisory threshold of 20 and makes SIGURG interruptions likely during the pre-commit test gate, requiring re-invocation to resume from progress file. Consider splitting preplanning/SKILL.md into smaller files or increasing the advisory threshold.
